title: Inspect vehicle paint, trim and accessories and recommend repair procedures
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Inspect vehicle paint, trim and accessories and recommend repair procedures demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for vehicle inspection

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Vehicle component specifications are sourced and interpreted from original equipment manufacturer (OEM) or authorised agency and workplace procedures1.3 Vehicle to be inspected is located, checked and confirmed against vehicle information in workplace instructions1.4 Inspection methods are determined and most appropriate option for vehicle and job requirement is selected1.5 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.6 Materials and equipment required to conduct inspection are sourced and prepared
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Vehicle component specifications are sourced and interpreted from original equipment manufacturer (OEM) or authorised agency and workplace procedures1.3 Vehicle to be inspected is located, checked and confirmed against vehicle information in workplace instructions1.4 Inspection methods are determined and most appropriate option for vehicle and job requirement is selected1.5 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.6 Materials and equipment required to conduct inspection are sourced and prepared?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Vehicle component specifications are sourced and interpreted from original equipment manufacturer (OEM) or authorised agency and workplace procedures1.3 Vehicle to be inspected is located, checked and confirmed against vehicle information in workplace instructions1.4 Inspection methods are determined and most appropriate option for vehicle and job requirement is selected1.5 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.6 Materials and equipment required to conduct inspection are sourced and prepared.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for vehicle inspection

elements.title: Inspect vehicle paint, trim and accessories

pcs.text: Vehicle paint, trim and accessories are inspected to determine damage or faults following workplace procedures and safety requirements2.2 Vehicle inspection is completed without causing damage to vehicle or components2.3 Inspection findings are recorded accurately according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Vehicle paint, trim and accessories are inspected to determine damage or faults following workplace procedures and safety requirements2.2 Vehicle inspection is completed without causing damage to vehicle or components2.3 Inspection findings are recorded accurately according to workplace procedures?

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Inspect vehicle paint, trim and accessories

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Repair options and rectification action are determined and noted in workplace documentation3.2 Final report identifying repair requirements, including in-house and sublet requirements and recommended repair methods, is prepared according to workplace procedures3.3 Final report is checked for accuracy and completeness and submitted for processing according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Repair options and rectification action are determined and noted in workplace documentation3.2 Final report identifying repair requirements, including in-house and sublet requirements and recommended repair methods, is prepared according to workplace procedures3.3 Final report is checked for accuracy and completeness and submitted for processing according to workplace procedures?
